allow: PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; $env:PYTHONUTF8="1"; $env:PIP_NO_COLOR="1"; $env:TERM="dumb"; $py = ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe"; & $py -m pip install --quiet --no-input "anthropic>=0.40,<1.0"; "EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; & $py -c "import anthropic, sys; print\('anthropic', anthropic.__version__\)")

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; $py = ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe"; & $py -m py_compile app/main.py app/middleware.py app/core/config.py app/core/leader_lock.py app/services/ask_vinaadi_service.py tests/test_ask_vinaadi.py; "PYCOMPILE_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; $env:PIP_NO_COLOR="1"; $py = ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe"; & $py -m pip install --quiet --no-input "ruff>=0.6" 2>$null; & $py -m ruff check app/main.py app/middleware.py app/core/config.py app/core/leader_lock.py app/services/ask_vinaadi_service.py tests/test_ask_vinaadi.py; "RUFF_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; $py = ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe"; & $py -m ruff check app tests --statistics 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 40; "RUFF_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; $py = ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe"; & $py -m ruff check --fix app/main.py app/middleware.py app/core/config.py app/core/leader_lock.py tests/test_ask_vinaadi.py 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 15; "RUFF_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; $py = ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe"; & $py -m ruff check app/main.py app/middleware.py app/core/config.py app/core/leader_lock.py app/services/ask_vinaadi_service.py tests/test_ask_vinaadi.py; "RUFF_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
